title: agrostis polymorpha var. pumila
intro: Agrostis polymorpha var. pumila, commonly known as the alpine bentgrass, is a low-growing, perennial grass species found in mountainous regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Agrostis polymorpha var. pumila include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
